testcase.name: shouldReturn400WithValidationErrorViaEndpoint
testcase.system-out: 16:37:14.399 [main] INFO org.springframework.mock.web.MockServletContext -- Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 16:37:14.399 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet -- Initializing Servlet '' 16:37:14.400 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet -- Completed initialization in 1 ms

testcase.name: shouldReturn404WithNotFoundErrorViaEndpoint
testcase.system-out: 16:37:14.458 [main] INFO org.springframework.mock.web.MockServletContext -- Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 16:37:14.458 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet -- Initializing Servlet '' 16:37:14.459 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet -- Completed initialization in 1 ms
